hero.title: Gusaba umugambi wo kworohereza abantu
hero.lead: Ishirahamwe IATF rirasuzuma ivyasabwe ku bijanye n'imigambi ijanye n'ukworohereza abantu kuronka ibitabu bivuye ku bintu vy'ukuri bikenewe.
support: Ntibikenewe ko umenya ibintu vyose bijanye n'iyo ngorane, ahubwo urakeneye gusa kumenya neza uwo iteye n'ico ivuze be n'igituma ihambaye.

intro: Inzira zose zirasuzumwa mu buryo bumwe.

items.label: Urubuga
items.body: Koresha urupapuro ruri aho hepfo kugira urungike ivyo usavye mu buryo butunganijwe neza.

items.label: E-mail yawe
items.body: Kurungika icegeranyo c'ibisabwa ku {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ibisabwa biciye kuri e-mail birashobora kuba inyandiko zisabwa ku mugaragaro inyuma yo gusubirwamwo no guhanagurwa.

items.label: Ukutumvikana
items.body: Mu gutangura ngaho nimba ari vyo vyoroshe. Ico gisabwa kiracabandanya mu gusuzumwa kumwe.

guidance.title: Imbere yo kurungika icegeranyo
paragraphs: IATF ikora ku mugaragaro. Ibisabwa birashobora kuvugwa mu ncamake hanyuma bigasohorwa nk'inyandiko z'ibisabwa n'abanyagihugu mw'ishirahamwe rya GitHub, kuri uru rubuga, canke kuri ivyo vyompi.

Ntimushireho aderese z'abantu, inomero za telefone, amakuru ajanye n'ivy'ubuvuzi, canke amakuru yerekana umwidondoro w'abantu bakoresha ubuhinga bwo gufasha, kiretse bibaye ngombwa kandi mwemeye ko IATF ibisuzuma.
IATF ikuraho amakuru y'abantu adakenewe imbere y'uko isohora inyandiko z'ibisabwa.

review.title: Ivyitezwe ku vyerekeye isubirwamwo
paragraphs: Gushikiriza icegeranyo ntibitanga icemeza c'uko kizokwemerwa.
Ishirahamwe IATF rirasuzuma ivyo basavye kugira risuzume ko bihuye n'igikorwa, ko bishoboka, ko ari ngirakamaro, be n'uko ico gikorwa coba gikwiye gushirwa mu bubiko bwa bose.
Ibisabwa bimwebimwe vyoshobora kwankwa, gusubirwamwo canke guhindurwa imbere y'uko vyemerwa.

fields.name: uwusaba
fields.label: Izina ryanyu canke ishirahamwe ryanyu
fields.helper: Ni nde ariko arasaba ico kintu?

fields.name: amakuru y'umwirondoro
fields.label: Ido n'ido ry'abavugana
fields.helper: Aderese ya e-mail canke nomero ya Discord yo gukurikirana.
fields.placeholder: Aderese imeyili canke izina rya Discord

fields.name: ikibazo
fields.label: Ni ingorane iyihe uriko uragerageza gutorera umuti?
fields.helper: Dondora iyo ntambamyi mu mvugo itomoye.

fields.name: Abakoresha bageramiwe
fields.label: Ni bande bigira ico bikoze kuri bo?

fields.name: extraUrutonde rw'ibivugwamwo
fields.label: Iyindi nkuru
fields.helper: Gutanga ikindi kintu cose cofasha gusigura ibikenewe: igituma bihambaye, uturorero, ivyerekezo, iciyumviro c'imishinga y'ubuhinga bwa none, canke imvo z'ibihe.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Woba wumva utekanye ku bijanye n'uguhingura ivyandikano ku mugaragaro?

items: ububiko bwa bose mw'ishirahamwe rya IATF GitHub
umuhinga mu vy'ubwubatsi ajejwe uwo mugambi
uruhusha rwa copyleft kuri code n'ibikoresho vy'umushinga
inyandiko y'inyandiko ku rubuga rwa IATF

header.title: Gusaba ikintu muri make kandi mu buryo butomoye birahagije kugira dutangure

paragraphs: Nimba mu vy'ukuri mufise ico mukeneye mu bijanye n'ugushikira abantu kandi mukaba mubona ko ico gikorwa gikwiye gushirwa ahabona n'abantu bose, murashobora kuturungikira ico kibazo.
